listicle.title: 7 signs you are on a serious casino lobby
items: Clear RTP or rules links inside each game where the studio provides them
Segregated wallets or visible bonus vs cash balance
Live chat under 2 minutes at peak hours
Deposit limits and cooling-off toggles in one menu
Transparent promotion terms (turnover, max bet, expiry)
Help centre articles that match what support actually says
